untranslatable_reason: Signal requires (1) 'Realized volatility percentile of historical distribution' and (2) 'Implied volatility rank' — neither direct historical percentile rank nor implied volatility rank indicators are available in the allowed set. Available volatility indicators (hvol_20, india_vix) do not provide percentile/rank transformations. (3) 'Time decay exceeds daily loss threshold' requires option Greeks (theta) not in allowed indicators. (4) Position sizing logic ('buy options in HIGH_VOL, sell/avoid in LOW_VOL') is directional context that cannot be encoded as a simple condition triplet without option-specific Greeks.
translation_notes: Proxied entry with hvol_20 > 0.65 (high realized volatility) and india_vix > 0.70 (elevated implied vol). Exit when hvol_20 < 0.35 (volatility mean reversion). Original signal requires implied volatility rank (IV percentile) and theta/time-decay metrics which are not in the allowed indicator set. Position sizing and instrument selection rules are strategic overlays that require separate portfolio-level logic outside the backtest rule engine scope.
